title: lycopodiella torta
intro: Lycopodiella torta, also known as tortuous forked fern, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that is native to tropical regions. Lycopodiella torta has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
